videos.headline: Georgia pressures Quinn Ewers to force game-sealing TO
videos.description: Georgia gets to Quinn Ewers and forces an errant throw to seal their win over Texas.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Georgia pressures Quinn Ewers to force game-sealing TO) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: No. 5 Georgia overcomes bizarre overturned call to beat No. 1 Texas
videos.description: Georgia lays down a huge marker in college football with a powerful 30-15 win over Texas.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF_Highlight (No. 5 Georgia overcomes bizarre overturned call to beat No. 1 Texas) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Andrew Mukuba shows off his focus to come away with INT
videos.description: Andrew Mukuba bobbles a Carson Beck pass before somehow coming away with it for a Texas interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Andrew Mukuba shows off his focus to come away with INT) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck throws his second INT of the game
videos.description: Texas' Jahdae Barron comes away with Carson Beck's second interception of the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Carson Beck throws his second INT of the game) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinn Ewers is hammered for a Georgia strip sack
videos.description: Daylen Everette flies off the edge and drills Quinn Ewers for a strip sack to set Georgia up in the red zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Quinn Ewers is hammered for a Georgia strip sack) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trevor Etienne cuts it outside for a Georgia TD
videos.description: Trevor Etienne gets outside the numbers to get Georgia on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Trevor Etienne cuts it outside for a Georgia TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Daylen Everette picks Quinn Ewers for Georgia
videos.description: Daylen Everette keeps his big first half going with an interception to set Georgia up with great field position.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Daylen Everette picks Quinn Ewers for Georgia) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trevor Etienne somehow keeps his footing for his 2nd TD
videos.description: Trevor Etienne dives across the goal line for his 2nd touchdown of the game to extend Georgia's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Trevor Etienne somehow keeps his footing for his 2nd TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arch Manning gets stripped for another Texas turnover
videos.description: Arch Manning gets the ball stripped by Damon Wilson II for Texas' third turnover of the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Arch Manning gets stripped for another Texas turnover) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinn Ewers and Isaiah Bond finally get Texas on the board
videos.description: Quinn Ewers and Isaiah Bond connect for Texas' first touchdown and two-point conversion.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Quinn Ewers and Isaiah Bond finally get Texas on the board) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Refs overturn crucial PI call after fans throw trash on the field
videos.description: After the referees call a controversial pass interference play, Texas fans throw trash on the field and the call is reversed.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Refs overturn crucial PI call after fans throw trash on the field) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaydon Blue cuts into Georgia's lead with a TD
videos.description: Quinn Ewers takes advantage of a Texas interception and finds Jaydon Blue to cut into Georgia's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaydon Blue cuts into Georgia's lead with a TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hat trick! Trevor Etienne punches it in for his 3rd TD
videos.description: Trevor Etienne burrows into the end zone on fourth-and-goal for his third touchdown of the game for Georgia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Hat trick! Trevor Etienne punches it in for his 3rd TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kirby Smart bashes officiating: 'They tried to rob us!'
videos.description: Georgia coach Kirby Smart praises his team's resilience and bashes the officiating in their win over Texas.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Kirby Smart bashes officiating: 'They tried to rob us!') 2024/10/19 ESHEET
